category_sources: source_facts.description says it filters IP addresses matching IPv4 CIDR/network specifications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is grepcidr; official homepage path and package metadata use grepcidr.
docs_sources: Official pc-tools.net project page is the best available documentation surface and source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official pc-tools.net page and source_facts.source-archive provide a tarball but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe CIDR/network filtering for IP addresses.
